What We Do

Services Provided

From design to installation to monitoring — we handle every aspect of your fire and life safety systems.

Fire Alarm Systems
Design, supply, and installation of commercial and residential fire alarm systems using Farenhyt and Kidde platforms.
Fire Extinguishers
Sales, inspection, and recharging of portable fire extinguishers for all facility types and hazard classifications.
Sprinkler Systems
Wet, dry, and pre-action sprinkler system design, installation, and inspection services.
Kitchen Systems
Ansul and commercial kitchen hood suppression systems — new installs, inspections, and recharges.
Suppression Systems
Clean agent, CO₂, and specialty suppression systems for server rooms, vaults, and industrial environments.
Camera Systems
IP and HD-over-coax camera systems — indoor/outdoor surveillance, remote viewing, NVR/DVR storage, and scalable recording platforms with analytics for any facility size.
Systems Designing
CAD-based system layouts, NFPA-compliant fire protection designs, and full submittal packages.
24/7 Monitoring
Around-the-clock UL-listed monitoring for fire, intrusion, and life safety systems with rapid response dispatch.
Audio / Video Systems
Commercial AV integration including speakers, display systems, and mass notification.
Data Cabling
Structured Cat6/Cat6A cabling, fiber optic runs, and full data network infrastructure.
Security Systems
Intrusion detection, alarm panels, and monitoring — commercial and residential.
Access Systems
Paxton smart access control — key fobs, card readers, mobile credentials, and cloud management.
Residential Electrical
Panel upgrades, outlet additions, lighting installs, and full residential rewiring services.
Our Partners

Authorized Brands

We stock and install from industry-leading manufacturers. Every product is sourced direct — ensuring genuine parts, full warranty, and factory support.

Farenhyt's IFP series panels offer advanced addressable fire detection with seamless integration. We stock panels, detectors, modules, and accessories.

Kidde's Vigilant Series (VS) and Evolve platforms deliver scalable, code-compliant fire alarm solutions for commercial facilities of any size.

Luminys delivers professional-grade IP cameras and NVR recording platforms — scalable HD surveillance with remote access, analytics, and seamless integration for commercial and industrial sites.

Paxton covers both the Net2 and Paxton10 product lines — scalable access control from single doors to enterprise sites, with cloud or on-premise management, video integration, and mobile credentials.

Strike First delivers professional-grade portable fire extinguishers — ABC dry chemical for multi-hazard protection and Class K for commercial kitchen environments. Built to NFPA 10 standards.

Napco's MAX2 platform delivers feature-rich fire alarm dialers and security control panels with built-in communicators, flexible zoning, and deep Alarm.com integration for total site monitoring.

Alarm.com is the leading smart security and monitoring platform. As an authorized dealer, we supply sensors, cameras, smart thermostats, locks, and connected devices — all managed from one powerful app.

Sony BRAVIA professional displays deliver crystal-clear visuals for security monitoring and digital signage. As an authorized dealer, we provide and install Sony screens built for 24/7 commercial environments.
